creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

The exp-run results are available at:  http://gohan4.ysv.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=head-amd64-PR191933-default&build=2014-08-04_11h02m57s

The new failures are checksum/fetch errors not related to your patch.
Also, libreoffice and freeradius3 now build successfully.

So it looks good.

Cheers,

Antoine
